announcements.text: Insider disclosure u/c 5.6.1(d): Mehdi Hassan Siddiqui (Executive) SELL 3,406 shares @ Rs455.00, ready market via CDC, dated 2026-06-16; cumulative holding 0.00%.
announcements.note: ATTACHMENT READ (GIF, backfilled 2026-06-18): executive SELL of 3,406 sh (~Rs1.55mn) — immaterial size, 0.00% cumulative. Mild-negative insider signal but not a thesis flag. HOLD unchanged. Title alone was insufficient — content only visible in attachment.

announcements.text: Corporate Briefing Session (held 06-18) — 9MFY26 (Jul'25–Mar'26) results deck. Net sales 2,241,056mn (-4% YoY); Gross profit 133,620mn (+82%); Operating profit 97,182mn (+97%); Equity 283,609mn (+13%); Borrowings 288,028mn (-19%); GP margin 5.96% vs 3.14%; Net margin 1.70% vs 0.65%; group consolidated 16,648mn; 71 new outlets; managed Hormuz/KPC force-majeure supply disruption.
announcements.note: ATTACHMENT READ (26pg PDF, backfilled 2026-06-18): materially POSITIVE — margin recovery (GP +82%, OP +97%) on -4% sales, deleveraging -19%. Title said 'briefing notice' (looked non-material); the deck is a full 9MFY26 results presentation. PSO not held (monitor, borderline Shariah) → no action, but signal logged.

commodities.source: brecorder RSS (Brent below $80 per Dawn headline; est ~$79-80)
commodities.note: Dawn: 'Oil falls below $80 as traders hope end of war, reopening of Hormuz' — consistent with Brent ~$79-80

macro_news.headline: Oil falls below $80 as traders hope end of war, reopening of Hormuz
macro_news.note: Brent now <$80; deepening bearish oil regime. Headwind for E&P. R-EXP-003 inverse thesis strengthening.

macro_news.headline: Business circles disappointed over SBP rate pause
macro_news.note: FPCCI wanted cuts; SBP held 11.5%. R-001 thesis intact — elevated rates support bank NIM.

macro_news.headline: Bulls toss KSE-100 index above 180,000 milestone
macro_news.note: Headline refers to recent rally; today's index only +0.07% — momentum fading, digestion phase.

macro_news.headline: Spending cuts to hit growth, warns Fitch in review of FY27 budget
macro_news.note: Fitch cautions on fiscal consolidation trade-offs — moderate negative for growth-sensitive sectors.

macro_news.headline: Iranian oil tankers pass US blockade after US-Iran deal
macro_news.note: Hormuz opening progressing; structurally bearish oil supply. E&P headwind continues.

macro_news.headline: Iran memorandum of understanding is not final, says Trump
macro_news.note: Trump caveat on Iran MOU — deal still conditional. Oil risk remains two-sided.

macro_news.headline: Rupee registers gain against US dollar
macro_news.note: PKR strengthening = improved macro sentiment; mild positive for importers, neutral for E&P.

macro_news.headline: Auto sector row rocks Senate body during Finance Bill 2026 review
macro_news.note: Finance Bill auto provisions contentious; watch MTL re: tractor-sector tax treatment.

warnings: KSE-100 breadth (advancers/decliners/total volume) not captured — market-watch TSV does not include index-level breadth stats. Sector indices used as proxy.
Brent price estimated from Dawn headline ('below $80') — exact level ~$79-80; not a precise figure.
